text: Pooled analysis of 5,800 births across the narrower range shows lower thermal-instability rates. Confidence interval overlaps land birth. Do not claim causal reduction.
Sample size 310. No pre-registered protocol. Cannot support a claim in either direction on long-horizon infection.
